name: per_team_pass_play with multi-year scope and no year split (historical-team wrap)
description: Regression: when a player-cell view selects multiple years without a year split, the per_team_pass_play rate must attribute each year's receiving stats to the player's team that year (Davante Adams: LV/2023, NYJ/2024, LA/2025), not to a single year_reference team's multi-year totals. The fix emits a per-pid wrap CTE that joins the (pid, year)-grain numerator subquery to player_year_teams on (pid, year) and to the (off, year)-grain denominator CTE on (team, year), summing back to pid. This test pins the wrap CTE shape so future refactors don't silently revert to the broken single-year-snapshot join.
expected_query: with "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "per_team_play_wrap_t1ae64a1e85c4619c19e6dc4351d45ad4" as materialized (select "num_y"."pid", SUM(num_y.measure_total) AS numerator_sum, SUM(t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25.rate_type_total_count) AS denominator_sum from (select "nfl_games"."year", nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS measure_total from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid, "nfl_games"."year") as "num_y" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "num_y"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "num_y"."year" inner join "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25" on "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "t21a5011d5affee915c2c2e34789a0f25"."year" = "num_y"."year" group by "num_y"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, CAST(MAX(per_team_play_wrap_t1ae64a1e85c4619c19e6dc4351d45ad4.numerator_sum) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(per_team_play_wrap_t1ae64a1e85c4619c19e6dc4351d45ad4.denominator_sum) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rec_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "per_team_play_wrap_t1ae64a1e85c4619c19e6dc4351d45ad4" on "per_team_play_wrap_t1ae64a1e85c4619c19e6dc4351d45ad4"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('WR') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
